Fix Vercel deployment: Use /tmp for file storage in serverless environment

- Modified submissionStore.ts to use /tmp/data on Vercel
- Modified authUtils.ts to use /tmp/.sessions.json on Vercel
- Updated README with warning about ephemeral storage
- Fixes "Failed to submit" error on Vercel due to read-only filesystem
